system.notes:
Abilities

  • Bear Hug: If the melded bear hits a target with a melee attack, it immediately makes a subdual test: Body + Athletics opposed by the target’s (Body or Agility) + Athletics. If the melded bear wins, the target gains the Grabbed status. The melded bear can only grab 1 target at a time. The target can spend a Major Action to repeat the subdual test. If the target wins, they are no longer Grabbed.
  • Camouflage: Sitting still in one spot for 10 minutes, a melded bear can camouflage itself to become effectively invisible on both the physical and astral planes. Observers make an Intuition + Perception test opposed by the bear’s Agility + Stealth test. If they win this test, they notice the melded bear. This effect ends when the bear takes an action.

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Low-Light
